---
    name: Bug Report
    about: Report an issue found in @dsnp/parquetjs
    title: ""
    labels: "bug"
    assignees: ""
---
Issue description
---------------
A short description of bug and what you believe the intended outcome should have been.
Thanks for reporting an issue!

Expected vs. Actual
---------------
- A description of what you expected
- A description of what happened instead

Isolated test case to reproduce the bug
----------------
- Paste small test cases in the comments
- Or link to a repository with a test case
- **REQUIRED:** You _must_ provide test data (a link is fine) if the issue is with correctness of parsing or output.  We do not have time to chase down this type of bug without test data.
